DEFENDANTS KARAVOLOS JOANNE TR AND KARAVOLOS JOANNE TRUST' MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS
Off Calendar Mar-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. SAYEH KHOEI, Esq. (tel: 818-300-4377) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS KARAVOLOS JOANNE TR AND KARAVOLOS JOANNE TRUST's MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' unopposed motion for change of venue to San Mateo County Superior Court and request for $675 in sanctions are granted. Plaintiff shall pay the transfer costs.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported.(302/RBU)

DEFENDANT KARAVOLOS JOANNE TR, KARAVOLOS JOANNE TRUST'S Motion For Change Of Venue; Request For Sanctions is transferred to be heard in department 302 on the Law & Motion Calendar at 9:30 a.m. on the same date.
